message:
🌱 Add litellm: [Bug]: `tool_choice` rejected when calling Azure GPT-5 mission (#1270)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,75 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "litellm-14704-bug-tool-choice-rejected-when-calling-azure-gpt-5-models",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "litellm: [Bug]: `tool_choice` rejected when calling Azure GPT-5 models",
+    "description": "[Bug]: `tool_choice` rejected when calling Azure GPT-5 models. This issue affects 17+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify litellm troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your litellm deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n litellm -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litellm\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litellm -n litellm --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review litellm configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant litellm configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n litellm -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litellm\nkubectl get configmap -n litellm -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=litellm\n```\n### What happened?\n\nWhen sending a chat completion request to **Azure GPT-5 reasoning models** through LiteLLM, requests that include `\"tool_choice\"` fail with:\n\n`UnsupportedParamsError: azure does not support parameters: ['tool_choice']`\n\n**Model"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for [Bug]: `tool_choice` rejected when calling Azure GPT-5…",
+        "description": "## Support temperature for GPT-5 Chat model\n\nGPT-5 chat is not an inference model, and since it requires support for parameters like temperature or tool_choice that are unavailable in inference models, I modified gpt_5_transformation to apply only when the model is a reasoning model.\n\nNote: Since\n```yaml\nError code: 400 - {'error_message': 'Chat completion failed', 'cause': \"UnsupportedParamsError: azure does not support parameters: ['tool_choice'], for model=gpt-5-chat-2025-08-07. To drop these, set `drop_params=True` or for proxy: `litellm_settings: drop_params: true`. If you want to use these params dynamically send allowed_openai_params=['tool_choice'] in your request.\"}\n\n....\n\nError code: 400 - {'error_message': 'Chat completion failed', 'cause': \"UnsupportedParamsError: gpt-5 models don't support temperature=0.0. Only temperature=1 is supported. To drop unsupported params set `drop_param\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm [Bug]: `tool_choice` rejected when calling Azure… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litellm -n litellm --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n litellm --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "## Support temperature for GPT-5 Chat model\n\nGPT-5 chat is not an inference model, and since it requires support for parameters like temperature or tool_choice that are unavailable in inference models, I modified gpt_5_transformation to apply only when the model is a reasoning model.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "Error code: 400 - {'error_message': 'Chat completion failed', 'cause': \"UnsupportedParamsError: azure does not support parameters: ['tool_choice'], for model=gpt-5-chat-2025-08-07. To drop these, set `drop_params=True` or for proxy: `litellm_settings: drop_params: true`. If you want to use these params dynamically send allowed_openai_params=['tool_choice'] in your request.\"}\n\n....\n\nError code: 400 - {'error_message': 'Chat completion failed', 'cause': \"UnsupportedParamsError: gpt-5 models don't support temperature=0.0. Only temperature=1 is supported. To drop unsupported params set `drop_params = True\"}"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "litellm",
+      "community",
+      "llm-gateway",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],

+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],

+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],

+      "repo": "https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/15198"
+    },
+    "reactions": 17,
+    "comments": 2,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },

+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],

+  },
